action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 4 trained 50 epochs, best val_acc=0.5830 at epoch 20. Iter 1 (10 epochs) got 0.7448 test accuracy. The val_acc is unreliable (noisy labels). Analysis: Need to submit epoch 20 checkpoint to compare. The training curve shows model still improving slowly. The key issue is that val_acc on noisy data doesn't reflect true test performance. Decision: Submit epoch 20 checkpoint from iter 4 to measure test accuracy. If better than 0.7448, great. Then try a more aggressive approach: use CLIP ViT-B/16 which has much stronger features, or implement DivideMix-style noise filtering.
